STS2_MULUNDUS-SPIKE_GROWTH.title: Spike Growth
STS2_MULUNDUS-BARKSKIN.title: Barkskin
STS2_MULUNDUS-DREAD_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have a card in your exhaust pile, apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-DREAD_SLASH.title: Dread Slash
STS2_MULUNDUS-DREAD_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-DREAD_STRIKE.title: Dread Strike
STS2_MULUNDUS-ABYSSAL_JOURNEY.descriptio:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your hand.
Draw 4 cards.
At the start of your turn, lose 1 max HP unless you are [gold]poisoned[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-ABYSSAL_JOURNEY.title: Abyssal Journey
STS2_MULUNDUS-THORN_WHIP.title: Thorn Whip
STS2_MULUNDUS-ROOT_INVASION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The enemy loses 1 strength.
STS2_MULUNDUS-ROOT_INVASION.title: Root Invasion
STS2_MULUNDUS-VERDANT_SIGHT.title: Verdant Sight
STS2_MULUNDUS-INVOKE_YOUR_OATH.descripti: Attacks you play this turn are played an additional time.
STS2_MULUNDUS-INVOKE_YOUR_OATH.title: Invoke Your Oath
STS2_MULUNDUS-TOXIC_FORTITUDE.title: Toxic Fortitude
STS2_MULUNDUS-WALL_OF_THORNS.title: Wall of Thorns
STS2_MULUNDUS-TOXIC_STRIKE.title: Toxic Strike
STS2_MULUNDUS-FORAGE.description: Add a [gold]Goodberry[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-FORAGE.title: Forage
STS2_MULUNDUS-INSECT_PLAGUE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Repeat this for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-INSECT_PLAGUE.title: Insect Plague
STS2_MULUNDUS-GOODBERRY.title: Goodberry
STS2_MULUNDUS-SUGAR_RUSH.description:
At the start of your turn, each card in your hand gains [gold]Ethereal.[/gold]
Whenever you play a [gold]Goodberry[/gold], draw a card.
STS2_MULUNDUS-SUGAR_RUSH.title: Sugar Rush
STS2_MULUNDUS-DANCE_IN_THE_DARK.descript:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw 2 cards.
At start of turn, this card plays from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-DANCE_IN_THE_DARK.title: Dance in the Dark
STS2_MULUNDUS-SLICE_OF_LIFE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and heal 1 HP for each card you've [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this turn.
STS2_MULUNDUS-SLICE_OF_LIFE.title: Slice of Life
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_DOWAGERS_DEAL.descript:
You lose 1 max HP.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_DOWAGERS_DEAL.title: The Dowager's Deal
STS2_MULUNDUS-BLOOMING_FORM.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, ALL enemies gain {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-BLOOMING_FORM.title: Blooming Form
STS2_MULUNDUS-DEATH_BLOOM.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} [gold]Energy[/gold].
Gain {ThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
Gain {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-DEATH_BLOOM.title: Death Bloom
STS2_MULUNDUS-DREAD_CLEAVE.title: Dread Cleave
STS2_MULUNDUS-REPOSITION.title: Reposition
STS2_MULUNDUS-METABOLIZE_TOXINS.descript:
Heal X for each debuff you have.
Lose ALL your [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-METABOLIZE_TOXINS.title: Metabolize
STS2_MULUNDUS-RECKLESS_ASSAULT.title: Reckless Assault
STS2_MULUNDUS-SOLEMNITY.description:
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
You and ALL enemies lose {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
STS2_MULUNDUS-SOLEMNITY.title: Solemnity
STS2_MULUNDUS-RELENTLESS_PURSUIT.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you are debuffed, draw a card.
STS2_MULUNDUS-RELENTLESS_PURSUIT.title: Relentless Pursuit
STS2_MULUNDUS-WEIRDING_WOOD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] another card, put this card into your [gold]Hand[/gold] from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-WEIRDING_WOOD.title: Weirding Wood
STS2_MULUNDUS-INFLICT_WOUNDS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deals 1 additional damage for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-INFLICT_WOUNDS.title: Inflict Wounds
STS2_MULUNDUS-GOODBERRY_CACHE.title: Goodberry Cache
STS2_MULUNDUS-TOXIC_STRENGTH.description: Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to the amount of [gold]Poison[/gold] you have.
STS2_MULUNDUS-TOXIC_STRENGTH.title: Toxic Strength
STS2_MULUNDUS-REVIVIFY.description:
Choose {Cards:diff()} cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
Put them on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-REVIVIFY.title: Revivify
STS2_MULUNDUS-TOXIC_SPIRAL.description: Gain {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] and {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each card you [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this turn.
STS2_MULUNDUS-TOXIC_SPIRAL.title: Toxic Spiral
STS2_MULUNDUS-HARVEST_THE_DEAD.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When an enemy dies, if this card is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], gain {GainHp:diff()} max HP.
STS2_MULUNDUS-HARVEST_THE_DEAD.title: Harvest the Dead
STS2_MULUNDUS-DECOMPOSE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Put {BerryAdd:diff()} [gold]Goodberry[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-DECOMPOSE.title: Decompose
STS2_MULUNDUS-LEAP_OF_FAITH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-LEAP_OF_FAITH.title: Leap of Faith
STS2_MULUNDUS-CLOAK_OF_WILTING.descripti:
You and ALL enemies lose {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
STS2_MULUNDUS-CLOAK_OF_WILTING.title: Cloak of Wilting
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_GOLDEN_RASPBERRY.title: The Golden Raspberry
STS2_MULUNDUS-ACORN_BUDDY.title: Acorn Buddy
STS2_MULUNDUS-COMMUNE_WITH_NATURE.descri:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
If you haven't played a card this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS2_MULUNDUS-COMMUNE_WITH_NATURE.title: Commune with Nature
STS2_MULUNDUS-BAD_MUSHROOM_TRIP.descript: When you draw this, [gold]Discard[/gold] a random card.
STS2_MULUNDUS-BAD_MUSHROOM_TRIP.title: Bad Mushroom Trip
STS2_MULUNDUS-REAPERS_RECKONING.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
STS2_MULUNDUS-REAPERS_RECKONING.title: Reaper's Reckoning
STS2_MULUNDUS-LIVING_BASTION.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Heal[/gold] 2 HP.
STS2_MULUNDUS-LIVING_BASTION.title: Living Bastion
STS2_MULUNDUS-LONGSTRIDER.title: Longstrider
STS2_MULUNDUS-BARBED_SHIELD.title: Barbed Shield
STS2_MULUNDUS-LIFE_ON_THE_EDGE.descripti: At the start of your turn, draw 2 additional cards if you're [gold]poisoned[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-LIFE_ON_THE_EDGE.title: Life on the Edge
STS2_MULUNDUS-TOXIN_FUELED_RAGE.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy for each [gold]Poison[/gold] you have.
STS2_MULUNDUS-TOXIN_FUELED_RAGE.title: Toxin-Fueled Rage
STS2_MULUNDUS-BRAMBLE_MANTLE.title: Bramble Mantle
STS2_MULUNDUS-FIND_TRAPS.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all your [gold]Status[/gold] cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], then draw that many cards.
STS2_MULUNDUS-FIND_TRAPS.title: Find Traps
STS2_MULUNDUS-GRIMDARK_GAMBIT.descriptio: Play {CardsToPlay:diff()} random cards from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-GRIMDARK_GAMBIT.title: Grimdark Gambit
STS2_MULUNDUS-SOUL_SHATTER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} to ALL enemies.
Put 3 [gold]Souls[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-SOUL_SHATTER.title: Soul Shatter
STS2_MULUNDUS-BLINDED_BY_HATRED.title: Blinded by Hatred
STS2_MULUNDUS-HATRED.description:
Put 3 [gold]Blinded by Hatred[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each [gold]Debuff[/gold] you have, and draw that many cards.
STS2_MULUNDUS-HATRED.title: Hatred
STS2_MULUNDUS-JAKE.title: Jake
STS2_MULUNDUS-ALJMOR.title: Aljmor
STS2_MULUNDUS-REFORGED_SOUL.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Increase this card's cost by 1.
STS2_MULUNDUS-REFORGED_SOUL.title: Reforged Soul
STS2_MULUNDUS-WRATH_OF_NATURE.descriptio:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} to ALL enemies for each card exhausted.
STS2_MULUNDUS-WRATH_OF_NATURE.title: Wrath of Nature
STS2_MULUNDUS-VOLATILE_FRENZY.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Poison[/gold] you have to ALL enemies.
Costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less for each time you've gained poison this combat.
STS2_MULUNDUS-VOLATILE_FRENZY.title: Volatile Frenzy
STS2_MULUNDUS-LOST_IN_DESPAIR.title: Lost in Despair
STS2_MULUNDUS-DESPAIR.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Put 2 [gold]Lost In Despair[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-DESPAIR.title: Despair
STS2_MULUNDUS-WITHER.title: Wither
STS2_MULUNDUS-BLOOM.title: Bloom
STS2_MULUNDUS-LACERATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deals {Damage2:diff()} additional damage for ALL your cards that are [gold]Grim[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-LACERATE.title: Lacerate
STS2_MULUNDUS-MANIFEST_DREAD.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS2_MULUNDUS-MANIFEST_DREAD.title: Manifest Dread
STS2_MULUNDUS-CUTTING_EDGE.description: Whenever you gain a debuff, deal {CuttingEdgePower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
STS2_MULUNDUS-CUTTING_EDGE.title: Cutting Edge
STS2_MULUNDUS-HAIL_OF_THORNS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each of your [gold]Thorns[/gold] to a random enemy.
STS2_MULUNDUS-HAIL_OF_THORNS.title: Hail of Thorns
STS2_MULUNDUS-SURVIVALISTS_BREW.descript:
Procure a random common potion.
Gain {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-SURVIVALISTS_BREW.title: Survivalist's Brew
STS2_MULUNDUS-CARBO_LOAD.description: Play ALL [gold]Goodberry[/gold] cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-CARBO_LOAD.title: Carbo Load
STS2_MULUNDUS-NECROSIS.description: When you draw this card, gain {FrailPower:diff()} [gold]Frail[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-NECROSIS.title: Necrosis
STS2_MULUNDUS-NECROTIC_WAVE.description:
Deal damage equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
Put two [gold]Necrosis[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-NECROTIC_WAVE.title: Necrotic Wave
STS2_MULUNDUS-BLOOD_WARP.title: Blood Warp
STS2_MULUNDUS-VIOLENT_FRENZY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {hits:diff()} times to ALL enemies.
Costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less to play equal to the amount of [gold]Debuffs[/gold] you've gained this turn.
STS2_MULUNDUS-VIOLENT_FRENZY.title: Violent Frenzy
STS2_MULUNDUS-CURSORS_LOG.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, put a random card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] that costs the same as the exhausted card on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-CURSORS_LOG.title: Cursor's Log
